name: French Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place the pie shell in a baking dish.
3. Arrange pear slices on top of the crust, overlapping slightly.
4. Sprinkle lemon rind over the pears.
5. Pour orange juice mixture over the pears, ensuring they are evenly coated.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the pears are tender and golden brown.
7. Allow to cool before serving.
